parameters.content:
# 🤖 WhatsApp AI Agent — Restaurant Bot
**بوت واتساب ذكي لمطعم بيت الأكل المصري**

---

## 📺 Tutorial Video
https://youtu.be/gFt1yf1-ukU?si=ZFLewzqIddB9sO4T

## 🔗 Webhook Setup Workflow
Import the companion workflow:
`meta-webhook-verifier.json`

## 🌐 Professional Automation Services
Need custom automation for your business?
👉 **https://yousefautomates.pages.dev/**

---

## 👨‍💻 Author
**م. يوسف الشربيني**
**Eng. Yousef Elsherbiny**
Automation & AI Specialist

---

## 📋 Workflow Overview
```
WhatsApp Trigger
      ↓
   IF Node (text message filter)
      ↓
   AI Agent (Groq LLM + Memory)
      ↓
   Send WhatsApp Reply
```

## ⚡ Tech Stack
- **n8n** — Workflow automation
- **Meta WhatsApp Business API** — Messaging
- **Groq + LLaMA 3.3 70B** — AI responses
- **Window Buffer Memory** — Conversation history

## ✅ Prerequisites & Setup Checklist

**Before activating this workflow:**

### 1️⃣ Meta WhatsApp Business API
- [ ] Meta Developer account created
- [ ] App created (Business type)
- [ ] WhatsApp product added
- [ ] Phone Number ID copied
- [ ] Permanent Access Token generated

### 2️⃣ Webhook Configuration
- [ ] Run the companion workflow first:
      `meta-webhook-verifier.json`
- [ ] Webhook verified in Meta Dashboard

### 3️⃣ n8n Credentials
- [ ] `WhatsApp Trigger API` configured
- [ ] `WhatsApp API` (send) configured
- [ ] `Groq API` key added

### 4️⃣ Customization
- [ ] Update restaurant name/menu in AI Agent
- [ ] Update Phone Number ID in Send node
- [ ] Test with your registered number

**📺 Full setup guide:**
https://youtu.be/gFt1yf1-ukU?si=ZFLewzqIddB9sO4T

nodes.name: WhatsApp Trigger
nodes.notes:
📥 ENTRY POINT
Receives all incoming WhatsApp messages via Meta Webhook.

⚠️ Credential Setup Required:
- Go to Credentials → WhatsApp Trigger API
- Add your App ID (Client ID)
- Add your App Secret (Client Secret)
- Both found in: Meta App → Settings → Basic

⚠️ Webhook must be verified first!
Use the companion workflow: meta-webhook-verifier.json

This node listens for 'messages' events only.
Status updates (delivered/read) are handled by the IF filter.

parameters.content:
## 📥 WhatsApp Trigger

**What it does:**
Listens for ALL incoming WhatsApp events including:
- 📨 Incoming messages (text, image, audio, etc.)
- ✅ Delivery status updates
- 👁️ Read receipts

**Why we need the IF node next:**
Meta sends multiple events for every message:
1. The actual message event
2. 'Delivered' status event
3. 'Read' status event

Without filtering, the AI would respond 3x to every message!
The IF node filters out non-text events.

**Credential fields needed:**
- Client ID = App ID (from Meta)
- Client Secret = App Secret (from Meta)

nodes.name: Filter: Text Messages Only
nodes.notes:
🔀 MESSAGE FILTER
Only allows TEXT messages to pass through to the AI.

TRUE branch → AI Agent (text message exists)
FALSE branch → Ignored (delivery/read receipts, media, etc.)

This prevents the AI from responding to:
- Delivery confirmations
- Read receipts
- Images/videos/voice notes
- Stickers

To handle media messages: add more conditions or
create separate branches for each message type.

parameters.content:
## 🔀 Smart Message Filter

**Checks:** Does `messages[0].text.body` exist?

**TRUE ✅** → Text message → Send to AI
**FALSE ❌** → Not a text → Stop here

**Messages that get filtered OUT:**
- ✅ Delivery receipts
- 👁️ Read receipts  
- 🖼️ Images
- 🎵 Voice notes
- 📹 Videos
- 📎 Documents
- 😄 Stickers

**💡 Pro Tip:** You can extend this workflow to handle media messages by adding more IF branches!

options.systemMessage:
أنت مساعد ذكي لمطعم "بيت الأكل المصري". شخصيتك مرحة، مضيافة، وتستخدم لهجة مصرية بيضاء خفيفة ومفهومة.

📋 معلومات المطعم:
الاسم: بيت الأكل المصري.
الموقع: القاهرة، حي المعادي.
المواعيد: من 12 ظهراً لحد 2 صباحاً.

المنيو:
🍲 طاجن ملوخية بالفراخ — 120 جنيه
🍚 طبق كشري عائلي — 80 جنيه
🍮 أرز بلبن — 35 جنيه

🛠 تعليمات الرد:
• ابدأ بترحيب مصري لطيف (مثل: نورتنا، يا مرحب، أهلاً بيك)
• جاوب على قد السؤال من المعلومات المتاحة فقط
• استخدم الرموز التعبيرية (Emojis) بشكل بسيط لإضافة روح للمحادثة
• لو العميل سأل عن أكلة مش في المنيو: "للأسف دي مش موجودة النهارده، بس جرب الأصناف اللي عندنا هتعجبك جداً 😊"
• لا تخترع معلومات غير موجودة في المنيو

nodes.name: AI Agent — Restaurant Assistant
nodes.notes:
🧠 AI BRAIN
Processes customer messages and generates intelligent responses.

Configuration:
- User Message: The customer's WhatsApp text
- System Message: Restaurant context, menu, behavior rules
- LLM: Groq (LLaMA 3.3 70B) — Free & Fast
- Memory: Window Buffer (per phone number session)

To customize for your business:
1. Update the restaurant name and location
2. Add/remove menu items with prices
3. Modify the response style/language
4. Add business hours, delivery info, etc.

The system prompt is written in Egyptian Arabic
for natural customer interaction.

parameters.content:
## 🧠 AI Agent Configuration

**Model:** LLaMA 3.3 70B via Groq
**Memory:** Per-customer session



### ✏️ To customize:
Click the AI Agent node → Edit System Message
Add your business info, menu, rules

### 🆓 Getting Groq API Key:
1. Go to console.groq.com
2. Create free account
3. Generate API Key
4. Add to n8n Credentials

**📺 Watch the tutorial:**
https://youtu.be/gFt1yf1-ukU

nodes.name: Groq — LLaMA 3.3 70B
nodes.notes:
⚡ LLM ENGINE
Using Groq's free API with LLaMA 3.3 70B model.

Why Groq?
- 100% FREE to use
- Extremely fast inference
- LLaMA 3.3 70B is highly capable
- Supports Arabic language well

To get your free API key:
1. Visit: console.groq.com
2. Sign up for free
3. Create an API key
4. Add it to n8n Credentials → Groq API

Alternative models you can use:
- llama-3.1-8b-instant (faster, lighter)
- mixtral-8x7b-32768 (good for Arabic)
- gemma2-9b-it

nodes.name: Conversation Memory (per customer)
nodes.notes:
💾 CONVERSATION MEMORY
Maintains separate conversation history for each customer.

Session Key: Customer's phone number
This means:
- Each customer has their own memory
- The AI remembers what was said earlier in the conversation
- Memory resets when n8n restarts

For persistent memory across restarts:
→ Replace with Redis Memory node
→ Or use Postgres Chat Memory node

Default window size: Last 5 exchanges
Increase for longer context, but uses more tokens.

parameters.content:
## ⚡ AI Sub-nodes

These nodes are **connected to the AI Agent** as tools:

### 🔮 Groq LLM
- Powers the AI responses
- Free API, ultra-fast
- Model: LLaMA 3.3 70B
- Get key at: console.groq.com

### 💾 Window Memory
- Remembers conversation history
- Separate memory per customer
- Session ID = customer phone number
- Default: last 5 message pairs

**💡 These connect to the AI Agent**
**via the sub-node connection points**
**(bottom of the AI Agent node)**

nodes.name: Send WhatsApp Reply
nodes.notes:
📤 SEND REPLY
Sends the AI-generated response back to the customer.

⚠️ IMPORTANT - Update these fields:
1. Phone Number ID: Replace with YOUR Phone Number ID
   → Found in Meta: WhatsApp → Getting Started
   → Or: WhatsApp → Phone Numbers

2. Credential: Set up WhatsApp API credential
   → Needs: Permanent Access Token (System User Token)
   → Needs: Business Account ID (WABA ID)

3. Recipient: Auto-filled from trigger (sender's number)
   → No changes needed here

4. Message Body: Auto-filled from AI Agent output
   → No changes needed here

Using TEMPORARY token? It expires every 24h!
Create a PERMANENT System User Token instead.
📺 Watch: https://youtu.be/gFt1yf1-ukU

parameters.content:
## 📤 Send Reply Configuration



### WhatsApp API Credential
Needs a PERMANENT Access Token:
1. Meta Business Suite → Settings
2. Users → System Users → Add
3. Assign WhatsApp permissions
4. Generate Token → Never Expires
5. Add to n8n Credentials

**⏰ Temporary token expires very fast !**
**Use System User Token for production.**

🌐 Need help setting up?
https://yousefautomates.pages.dev/
